title: Predictive models of gene regulation from high-throughput epigenomics data.
author: Althammer S Pages A Eyras E
content: S-EPMC3424690 PMC3424690 Predictive models of gene regulation from high-throughput epigenomics data. The epigenetic regulation of gene expression involves multiple factors. The synergistic or antagonistic action of these factors has suggested the existence of an epigenetic code for gene regulation
